description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named FISCO-BCOS release Actions that triggers on push with tags not matching v1.* and not on any branch, as well as on published or created releases. The workflow should have two jobs: one for macOS and one for CentOS. The macOS job should check out the repository, install Rust, configure and compile the project, and upload various binaries to the release. The CentOS job should run in a CentOS container, install dependencies, check out the repository, install Rust, configure and compile the project, and upload various binaries to the release.
